title: centaurea ochrocephala
intro: Centaurea ochrocephala, also known as red cornflower or false cornflower, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea ochrocephala include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
